api.name: get_trade_call
api.description: Composite verdict BUY SELL HOLD trade call for crypto perpetual futures on Binance Bybit OKX Bitget Hyperliquid. Returns verdict, confidence, market regime, funding rate, reasoning. Verified track record, merkle anchor on Base — on-chain verified. MCP tool for trading. Cross-venue multi-exchange AI trading signal for Claude trading agents.

coin.description: Asset — BTC ETH SOL signal for crypto perpetual futures or TradFi symbol.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe (1m to 1d) for crypto quant agents. Default 15m intraday.

includeReasoning.description: Include reasoning for the trade call verdict (regime, trend ranging signals).

coin.description: Asset — BTC ETH SOL signal for crypto perpetual futures or TradFi symbol.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe (1m to 1d) for crypto quant agents. Default 15m intraday.

includeReasoning.description: Include reasoning for the trade call verdict (regime, trend ranging signals).

api.name: scan_funding_arb
api.description: Cross-venue funding arbitrage scanner. Funding rate spreads across Binance Bybit OKX Bitget Hyperliquid perpetual futures — long one, short other. Composite verdict, multi-exchange funding intelligence. MCP tool for trading. AI trading signal for crypto quant + Claude trading agents. Verified track record, on-chain verified merkle anchor on Base.

minSpreadBps.description: Minimum funding rate spread (bps) for buy sell hold trade call cross-venue scan.

limit.description: Max funding arbitrage results returned (free tier cap 5). Crypto signal query.

api.name: get_market_regime
api.description: Market regime classifier — TRENDING_UP TRENDING_DOWN RANGING VOLATILE — for crypto perpetual futures on Binance Bybit OKX Bitget Hyperliquid. Composite verdict blends trend ranging signals, volatility, cross-venue funding rate sentiment. Returns label, confidence, strategy hint. MCP tool for trading. Verified track record, merkle anchor on Base.

coin.description: Asset symbol — BTC ETH SOL signal. Crypto quant trade call classification.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe — 1h 4h 1d. Buy sell hold regime context for AI trading signal.

exchange.description: Exchange BINANCE HL BYBIT OKX BITGET. Multi-exchange Claude trading agent.

api.name: search_knowledge
api.description: Ask AlgoVault any question about its MCP tools, response shapes, integration patterns (LangChain / LlamaIndex / MAF / CrewAI), or code examples. Returns ranked snippets from the canonical knowledge bundle. Use this BEFORE attempting any tool call to confirm correct parameter usage and avoid hallucinating tool shapes. Fast (BM25 lexical search, no LLM call, no quota cost). For natural-language synthesized answers, use chat_knowledge instead.

api.name: chat_knowledge
api.description: Ask AlgoVault a natural-language question — get a synthesized answer with citations, grounded in the canonical knowledge bundle (every MCP tool description, response shape, integration tutorial, and code example). Use this when you need an explanation, code pattern, or "how do I" answer. For raw ranked snippets without LLM synthesis, use search_knowledge (faster, no quota cost). Quota: Free 10/month, Starter 50/month, Pro 200/month, Enterprise 2000/month.

api.name: scan_trade_calls
api.description: Cross-asset market scanner — composite verdict BUY SELL HOLD trade calls across the top 1-100 crypto perpetual futures by open interest on Binance Bybit OKX Bitget Hyperliquid. Returns ranked non-HOLD calls with confidence and market regime. One scan, whole-market coverage for AI trading agents. Use get_trade_call for per-coin depth and reasoning.

topN.description: Scan the top-N perps by open interest (1-100, default 20). Whole-market scan.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe (1m to 1d) for the scan. Default 15m intraday.

exchange.description: Venue: BINANCE (default) HL BYBIT OKX BITGET — top perps by open interest.

minConfidence.description: Optional min confidence (0-100) filter applied to non-HOLD trade calls.

includeHolds.description: Include HOLD calls after non-HOLD (default false). HOLDs never cost quota.

limit.description: Max ranked calls returned (1-100, default 10). Non-HOLD ranked first.

meta.title: Crypto Quant Signal MCP
meta.description: Composite BUY/SELL/HOLD trade calls across 5 crypto perp venues (Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, Hyperliquid). Verified track record, Merkle-anchored on Base L2. Drop-in tutorials for LangChain, LlamaIndex, Microsoft Agent Framework, and CrewAI. Ask-AlgoVault-anything via search_knowledge + chat_knowledge tools.
